variables.name: ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS
variables.description: Set of allowed file extensions for upload.

variables.name: DEFAULT_MAX_FILE_SIZE
variables.description: Maximum upload file size in bytes (100 MB).

variables.name: OCR_AVAILABLE
variables.description: Whether Tesseract OCR is available for scanned PDF processing.

variables.name: VITE_API_BASE_URL
variables.description: Base URL for the REST API backend (frontend).

variables.name: VITE_WS_BASE_URL
variables.description: Base URL for the WebSocket connection to backend (frontend).
